arts.ttl: Preview: Notts County vs. Morecambe - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League Two clash between Notts County and Morecambe, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Notts County's 2-1 win against Gillingham last weekend was their fifth game without defeat and they have now won eight of their last 10 games. Morecambe's 2-1 defeat against Newport was their sixth i...
